# Ignore local quantum mechanics binaries & libraries
bin/
xtb/
*.exe
*.dll

# Ignore temporary runtime logs generated by xTB calculations
xtbout
xtbrestart
wbo
chrg
coord
charges
gfnff_topo
temp_query_molecule.xyz
*_temp.xyz

# Ignore Python runtime artifacts
__pycache__/
*.pyc
.ipynb_checkpoints/
